zh.lifeSummary: 當Allen Flegg於大約1575年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可希達哈姆時，他的父親John Flegg43歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg43歲。他於1611年7月30日與Nazareth Devoroys在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他埋葬在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Allen Flegg于大约1575年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可希達哈姆时，他的父亲John Flegg43岁，母亲Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg43岁。他于1611年7月30日与Nazareth Devoroys在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他埋葬在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Flegg

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Allen Flegg was born about 1575, in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Flegg, was 43 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, was 43. He married Nazareth Devoroys on 30 July 1611, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He was buried in Hardingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Allen Flegg est né environ 1575, à Shipdham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Flegg, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Nazareth Devoroys le 30 juillet 1611, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Ilenterré à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Allen Flegg um 1575 in Shipdham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Flegg 43 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg 43. Er hat am 30. Juli 1611 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England Nazareth Devoroys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er wurde in Hardingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Allen Flegg è nato il circa 1575 nel Shipdham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Flegg, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Nazareth Devoroys il 30 luglio 1611, nel Hardingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Fu sepolto a Hardingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.Shipdham, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハム

ja.lifeSummary: Allen Fleggが約1575年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシュイプドハムで生まれた時，父John Fleggは43歳，母Mrs. Elizabeth Fleggは43歳であった。1611年7月30日にイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムでNazareth Devoroysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Allen Flegg(이)가 대략 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 시p드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Flegg(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1611년 7월 30일 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 Nazareth Devoroys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Allen Flegg nasceu aproximadamente 1575, em Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Flegg, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Nazareth Devoroys em 30 de julho de 1611, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele foi sepultado em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Allen Flegg родился около 1575 г. в местности шипдхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Flegg было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Nazareth Devoroys 30 июля 1611 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он был похоронен в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Allen Flegg nació aproximadamente 1575, en Shipdham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Flegg, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mrs. Elizabeth Flegg, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Nazareth Devoroys el 30 de julio de 1611, en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Fue sepultado en Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
